name: Event Countdown
description: Countdown story for upcoming matches, events, or announcements. Uses Instagram's countdown sticker or a custom countdown design.
guidelines: Feature a large countdown number or use Instagram's native countdown sticker placed in the designated sticker zone. Background should be an atmospheric stadium or match-related image. The event name and date must be clearly visible. Use animated number transitions for video stories. Post daily countdown stories starting 3 days before the event.
